contentHtml:
Features

  • New Interactive World Website:  https://clio.angelssword.com
    • Mirane Start Guide
    • DM Tools
    • Mirane DM Tools
  • New Character Builder:  Build characters like never before!  Follow Aniela's guidance as she helps you through it.
  • New Character Vault.  Store your characters locally, save them and export to spreadsheet format!  Then level them up, buy items.
    • Homebrew system!  Easily add new classes, new items, breakthroughs and abilities via the DM Tool (DM access for now).  Make and just send your players a copy/paste code or export file to import them.
  • New fully immersive Adventure Mode.
    • Riannon Institute of Alchemy Library:  Learn more about the lore, read webnovels and check out other lore related material.
    • Mirane Tavern:  Speak with Mirane NPCs
    • Queri's Combat School:  Learn how to fight!
    • Memorial:  Remember the memory of the fallen.
    • Mirane Expeditioner's Alliance HQ:  Access campaign tools and build your character.

Races

  • Demon, Raijin, Gnome: Passives that let you enter a class at no exp cost now instead just give you the class at level 1.
  • Selkie
    • Aqua Drill removed, replaced with Blue Soul which grants Hydromancer Level 2 start.
    • Aquatic Fae, Water Mastery Removed

Classes

  • Added option for expertise on the tier 1 classes journey ability.
  • NEW:
    • Seven Sorrows Sword Style, a tier 2 edgy class.
  • Acolyte
    • Now requires the new (free) breakthrough.
    • Upon mastering the class, gain a free elemental mastery tied to your chosen god.
  • Aerial Mage
    • Can now be accessed through Artificer.
  • Aeromancer
    • Downburst cost reduced to 2 AP, but now costs 1 Mana.
  • Aeromaster
    • Downburst II cost reduced to 1 RP, but now costs 1 Mana.
  • Aurora Blade
    • Aurora Slash wall now lasts until end of turn instead of start.
  • Bloodbinder
    • Transfusion has the Quick keyword.
  • Cannoneer
    • Cannonball light attack is now affected by cannon mods that modify the splash attack of it.
  • Dark Priest
    • Can now be entered through Eremancer.
  • Electromancer
    • Bolting now has Artillery keyword.
  • Eremancer
    • Energy Drain now does full pierce dark damage (that ignores dark resistance).
  • Fae Knight
    • Fluttering Blade now works with items in dimensional storage.
  • Fae Knight Willow Style
    • Willow Stance wording updated from focus to agility.
    • Bunch of balancing changes.
  • Grandmaster
    • Check now has the Active keyword.
  • Jonin
    • Ougi now has the Active keyword.
  • Naturalist
    • Can now be accessed through Medic.
  • Peltast
    • Key ability now lets you boomerang non-thrown weapons again.
  • Pyromaster
    • Meteor now has Active keyword.
  • Pierrot
    • Pie toss AoO cost updated.
  • Sanctioner
    • Can now be accessed through Medic.
  • Starcaller
    • Specified that the artillery gaining part is only outdoors.
  • Time Thief
    • Shatter Time can no longer use abilities with the active keyword.
  • Veilguard
    • Shield burst now restricted to mana temporary HP.

Breakthroughs

  • NEW:
    • Divine's Chosen, a 0 exp breakthrough that basically locks you into the god you choose. Modifies some religious type abilities.
  • Sylphs can now take Racial Flight.
  • Elixir Addict required is now 3 in the same encounter.

Items

  • Elemental Grease cost increased from 300→301.
  • Cannon now lists as Artifice.
  • Added some mods for Cannon and Power Gauntlets.
  • Fire Robe and Snow Cloak now state they take the cloak slot.

Keywords

  • NEW:
    • Divine
    • Isolated
  • Unbalanced now only affects attack that actually cost AP.
  • Artillery wording updated, now calculates target from above the target instead of just ignoring all cover.
contentText:
Features

- New Interactive World Website:  https://clio.angelssword.com- Mirane Start Guide
- DM Tools
- Mirane DM Tools

- New Character Builder:  Build characters like never before!  Follow Aniela's guidance as she helps you through it.
- New Character Vault.  Store your characters locally, save them and export to spreadsheet format!  Then level them up, buy items.- Homebrew system!  Easily add new classes, new items, breakthroughs and abilities via the DM Tool (DM access for now).  Make and just send your players a copy/paste code or export file to import them.

- New fully immersive Adventure Mode.- Riannon Institute of Alchemy Library:  Learn more about the lore, read webnovels and check out other lore related material.
- Mirane Tavern:  Speak with Mirane NPCs
- Queri's Combat School:  Learn how to fight!
- Memorial:  Remember the memory of the fallen.
- Mirane Expeditioner's Alliance HQ:  Access campaign tools and build your character.

Races

- Demon, Raijin, Gnome: Passives that let you enter a class at no exp cost now instead just give you the class at level 1.
- Selkie- Aqua Drill removed, replaced with Blue Soul which grants Hydromancer Level 2 start.
- Aquatic Fae, Water Mastery Removed

Classes

- Added option for expertise on the tier 1 classes journey ability.
- NEW:- Seven Sorrows Sword Style, a tier 2 edgy class.

- Acolyte- Now requires the new (free) breakthrough.
- Upon mastering the class, gain a free elemental mastery tied to your chosen god.

- Aerial Mage- Can now be accessed through Artificer.

- Aeromancer- Downburst cost reduced to 2 AP, but now costs 1 Mana.

- Aeromaster- Downburst II cost reduced to 1 RP, but now costs 1 Mana.

- Aurora Blade- Aurora Slash wall now lasts until end of turn instead of start.

- Bloodbinder- Transfusion has the Quick keyword.

- Cannoneer- Cannonball light attack is now affected by cannon mods that modify the splash attack of it.

- Dark Priest- Can now be entered through Eremancer.

- Electromancer- Bolting now has Artillery keyword.

- Eremancer- Energy Drain now does full pierce dark damage (that ignores dark resistance).

- Fae Knight- Fluttering Blade now works with items in dimensional storage.

- Fae Knight Willow Style- Willow Stance wording updated from focus to agility.
- Bunch of balancing changes.

- Grandmaster- Check now has the Active keyword.

- Jonin- Ougi now has the Active keyword.

- Naturalist- Can now be accessed through Medic.

- Peltast- Key ability now lets you boomerang non-thrown weapons again.

- Pyromaster- Meteor now has Active keyword.

- Pierrot- Pie toss AoO cost updated.

- Sanctioner- Can now be accessed through Medic.

- Starcaller- Specified that the artillery gaining part is only outdoors.

- Time Thief- Shatter Time can no longer use abilities with the active keyword.

- Veilguard- Shield burst now restricted to mana temporary HP.

Breakthroughs

- NEW:- Divine's Chosen, a 0 exp breakthrough that basically locks you into the god you choose. Modifies some religious type abilities.

- Sylphs can now take Racial Flight.
- Elixir Addict required is now 3 in the same encounter.
Items

- Elemental Grease cost increased from 300→301.
- Cannon now lists as Artifice.
- Added some mods for Cannon and Power Gauntlets.
- Fire Robe and Snow Cloak now state they take the cloak slot.
Keywords

- NEW:- Divine
- Isolated

- Unbalanced now only affects attack that actually cost AP.
- Artillery wording updated, now calculates target from above the target instead of just ignoring all cover.
